category_sources: source_facts.description says RamaLama makes working with AI boring; official docs describe local management and serving of AI models with containers.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub repository use RamaLama; source_facts.name is ramalama.
docs_sources: Official RamaLama docs site provides getting started and command reference documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to github.com/containers/ramalama; official docs and GitHub search result identify it as the RamaLama source repository.
tags_sources: Official docs describe AI model management, local serving, containers, Podman/Docker, registries, and inference workflows.
